methodology: Outcome-based OKRs connected to customer jobs, product capabilities, and product bricks.
okrDesignPrinciples: Use measurable customer and business outcomes
Tie initiatives to product bricks and teams
description: Current quarter objectives for production AI adoption and governed data platform expansion

companyObjectives.name: Grow trusted cloud data and AI adoption
companyObjectives.description: Create durable cloud consumption by helping enterprises build and operate data and AI systems safely.

objectives.name: Increase governed production AI adoption
objectives.description: Move AI workloads from pilots into secure, evaluated, observable production paths.

objectives.name: Reduce data and AI unit cost surprises
objectives.description: Improve cost attribution, anomaly detection, and optimization across warehouse, training, and inference workloads.
